java.util.stream/Collectors/filtering.name: filtering
signatures: public static<T, A, R> Collector<T, ?, R> filtering(Predicate<? super T> predicate, Collector<? super T, A, R> downstream)

description.en: Adapts aCollectorto one accepting elements of the same typeTby applying the predicate to each input element and only accumulating if the predicate returnstrue.

java.util.stream/Stream/flatMap.name: flatMap
signatures: public <R> Stream<R> flatMap(Function<? super T, ? extends Stream<? extends R>> mapper)

description.en: Returns a stream consisting of the results of replacing each element of this stream with the contents of a mapped stream produced by applying the provided mapping function to each element.

info.excerpt: Returns a stream consisting of the results of replacing each element of this stream with the contents of a mapped stream produced by applying the provided mapping function to each element.
